cookieConsent.body: We use PostHog (EU-hosted) to understand how people use CommandCenter — page views, feature clicks, error rates. No personal data is collected. You can decline, and the app works the same. See

orgGate.title: Add your organisationsnummer to continue
orgGate.body: Your 30-day grace period has ended. To keep using CommandCenter we need your company's 10-digit Swedish organisationsnummer on file. This is required for VAT-compliant invoicing and to confirm the legal entity behind your account.
orgGate.subBody: It takes about ten seconds. Click below, paste your number, and you're back in.

roleGate.title: You don't have access to this page
roleGate.body: Your account role ({role}) doesn't include this section. If you need access, ask your account owner to contact CommandCenter and we'll update your permissions.
